title: crotalaria erythrophleba
intro: Crotalaria erythrophleba is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree native to tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria erythrophleba include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be attributed to the presence of certain alkaloids and flavonoids in the plant. The health benefits of using Crotalaria erythrophleba include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are typically consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
